name: Dirt Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the JELL-O chocolate pudding according to the package instructions.
2. Thaw the COOL-WHIP topping if necessary.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the prepared chocolate pudding and thawed COOL-WHIP topping until well combined.
4. Place an equal amount of pudding mixture into each of the 10 plastic cups.
5. Press one Chocolate sandwich cookie onto the top of the pudding in each cup.
6. Refrigerate the cups until ready to serve.
